name: MoneyGram
description_short: MoneyGram is a money transfer service operating through retail partner locations, enabling consumers to send and receive money both online and in-person across the U.S.
description_long:
MoneyGram is an established money transfer service that operates through a network of third-party retail locations rather than company-owned storefronts. The company has built its infrastructure by partnering with convenience stores, supermarkets, and financial service retailers like Walmart, CVS, Ace Cash Express, and local merchants. This franchise model allows MoneyGram to maintain a broad geographic footprint without managing physical locations directly.

MoneyGram's core offering centers on domestic and international money transfer services. Consumers can send money to recipients and receive funds at partner locations, with the flexibility to manage transfers either online through their website or offline at physical partner stores. The service integrates with multiple retail channels, from large national chains to independent operators, creating accessibility across urban and suburban markets. Their website indicates they operate locations across multiple states including Colorado, Indiana, Missouri, and Illinois, with varying hours based on partner location operating times.

The company's primary distinction is its extensive retail partnership network, which provides convenience through familiar neighborhood locations. Rather than requiring customers to visit a dedicated MoneyGram office, users can conduct transfers at grocery stores, pharmacies, and check-cashing outlets they may already frequent. This omnichannel approach—combining online management with offline transaction completion—appeals to consumers who prefer flexibility in how they access money transfer services.

MoneyGram serves a practical but niche market within consumer finance. The service is best suited for customers who need occasional money transfer capabilities and value retail convenience. However, consumers should note that actual fees, exchange rates, and transfer speed details are not visible on the location-finder page reviewed, requiring users to contact individual partner locations or visit their full website for complete pricing and service terms.
pros: Extensive retail partner network across multiple states (CO, IN, MO, IL visible) providing neighborhood accessibility
Flexible service model allowing both online and offline transaction management
Extended operating hours through partner locations, with some open until 11:59 PM
Integration with recognized national retailers (Walmart, CVS) plus local merchants for consumer convenience
Dual send/receive capability enabling bidirectional money transfers
Wide geographic coverage with 26+ locations found in Aurora area searches alone
cons: No pricing, fee, or exchange rate information provided on the location-finder page; customers must contact partners individually
Transfer speed and service limitations not disclosed on the reviewed website content
Service quality dependent on partner location staff and hours, creating inconsistent consumer experience
Limited transparency about which services are available at which partner locations
No mention of fraud protection, dispute resolution, or customer service guarantees visible on location pages
best_for: Consumers sending occasional domestic money transfers who value retail location convenience
Users who already shop at Walmart, CVS, or neighborhood markets and want integrated financial services
Individuals preferring to avoid dedicated financial institution visits for routine money transfers
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for consumers who need occasional domestic money transfer capabilities and value the convenience of retail partner locations in their neighborhood. The critical caveat is that detailed pricing, fees, and service terms are not available on the location-finder pages; users must contact individual partner locations or visit the full corporate website to understand actual costs and transfer timelines before committing to the service.
services: Domestic money transfers through retail partner locations
Money receiving at partner locations nationwide
Online money transfer management and setup
In-person cash transfer at Walmart locations
Transfer services at independent retailers (Ace Cash Express locations)
Transfer services at grocery and supermarket partners
Multi-state availability for sending and receiving funds
